facts.title: Wired and fast
facts.fact: South Korea has some of the world's fastest average internet speeds and near-universal smartphone use. Transit, payments, and even restaurant orders are heavily app-based.
facts.note: **와이파이** (wifi) is widely available in cafés, subways, and buses.

facts.title: High-speed rail
facts.fact: The KTX high-speed train links major cities at up to 300 km/h, putting most of the country within a few hours of Seoul.
facts.korean_en: I go to Busan by train.
facts.note: In 기차로, the particle **(으)로** marks the means: "by train."
